portfolio.tip: Shows the current value of your position in the ERC-4626 vault. Calculated as: your shares × share price. The share price increases as the vault generates fees.

invest.tip: Deposit USDC to receive vAI shares. The vault uses the funds to provide liquidity on Uniswap V3, generating trading fees that are shared proportionally with investors.

market.tip: Real-time market data from the ETH/USDC 0.05% pool on Uniswap V3. Source: The Graph subgraph or CoinGecko as fallback.

system.tip: Overall system status: on-chain vault, AI services, risk metrics and automated operations history.

price.label: Price
price.tip: Current spot price of ETH in USDC on the Uniswap V3 0.05% pool. Updated in real-time from on-chain data.

tick.label: Tick
tick.tip: Current tick in Uniswap V3's discrete price system. Each tick represents a 0.01% price increment (log₁.₀₀₀₁ of price). The current tick determines which liquidity ranges the price falls within.

twap.label: TWAP
twap.tip: Time-Weighted Average Price — a time-weighted average that is resistant to manipulation. Calculated from recent on-chain observations. Used as a safe price reference by the AI system.

liquidity.label: Liquidity
liquidity.tip: Total liquidity available in the pool around the current price. Higher value means less slippage for traders and more fees generated for liquidity providers.

volume24h.label: Volume 24h
volume24h.tip: Trading volume in the last 24 hours on the ETH/USDC 0.05% pool. High volume generates more fees for the vault. Data from The Graph (Uniswap V3 subgraph).

volatility1d.label: Volatility 1D
volatility1d.tip: 1-day realized volatility, calculated from hourly logarithmic returns of real OHLC data. The AI uses this value to determine the ideal liquidity range width.

atr.label: ATR
atr.tip: Average True Range — measures market volatility by the average price movement. Calculated as: price × 1D volatility. Used by the AI to calibrate rebalancing thresholds.

stdDev.label: Std Deviation
stdDev.tip: Standard deviation of price returns. High values indicate a more volatile market. The AI uses this value to adjust range widths and allocation between strategies (Core/Defensive/Opportunistic).

impermanentLoss.label: IL (Impermanent Loss)
impermanentLoss.tip: Estimated impermanent loss of the current position compared to simply holding the tokens. It is a temporary loss that occurs when the price moves away from the entry price. The AI tries to minimize IL through rebalancing.

maxDrawdown.label: Max Drawdown
maxDrawdown.tip: Largest percentage drop in vault value from the historical peak. A downside risk indicator. Lower value is better.

var95.label: VaR 95%
var95.tip: Value at Risk at 95% confidence — maximum expected loss under normal market conditions (5% probability of exceeding this value). Calculated based on current volatility.

sharpe.label: Sharpe Ratio
sharpe.tip: Risk-adjusted return. Calculated as (return - risk-free rate) / standard deviation. Sharpe > 1 is good, > 2 is excellent. Measures how much extra return you get per unit of risk.

sortino.label: Sortino Ratio
sortino.tip: Similar to Sharpe, but only penalizes downside volatility. More relevant for investors primarily concerned with losses. Sortino > 1 is good.

calmar.label: Calmar Ratio
calmar.tip: Annualized return divided by Max Drawdown. Measures return efficiency relative to the worst historical scenario. Calmar > 1 is considered good.
